infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ingrivio uses your camera to scan and identify food ingredients and analyze nutrition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ingrivio accesses your photo library to analyze food images for ingredient detection and nutrition analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Ingrivio to access your photos for food analysis.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Ingrivio to use your camera to scan ingredients and food.
